## Checklist

- [ ] Agent `description` frontmatter accurately reflects when the agent should be invoked
- [ ] Any new security guidance is accurate and references a credible standard
- [ ] Templates use `[PLACEHOLDER]` format for fields that need to be filled in
- [ ] Example walkthroughs reflect realistic outputs, not aspirational ones
- [ ] No sensitive data, real credentials, or internal system details in examples
